themes.name: App performance & bugs
themes.summary: Lag, crashes during trading hours; login/session timeouts.
quotes: The app freezes exactly when the market opens, very frustrating.
Login keeps failing during peak hours.

action_ideas.title: Stabilize peak-time performance
action_ideas.rationale: Scale infra during market hours; improve crash visibility.

themes.name: Customer support friction
quotes: Support takes days to reply and does not solve the issue.
Chat support is useless, no one responds.

action_ideas.title: Improve support SLA visibility
action_ideas.rationale: Expected response time in-app; ticket status tracking.

themes.name: UX & feature gaps
themes.summary: Confusing navigation for portfolio insights; missing advanced analytics.
quotes: Good for beginners but lacks detailed analysis tools.
Portfolio view is hard to find and understand.

action_ideas.title: Enhance power-user features
action_ideas.rationale: Advanced portfolio analytics; clearer investments navigation.

audience_notes.product: Focus on app stability during trading hours and UX improvements.
audience_notes.support: Prepare for increased ticket volume around login issues.
audience_notes.leadership: Addressing top 3 themes could improve retention by 15-20%.
